displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #43: The Empire Strikes Back: Betrayal at Bespin
synopsis: Han Solo and Leia Organa arrive at Cloud City hoping for refuge with Han's old friend Lando Calrissian, but the Empire has arrived first and takes the Rebels captive. Darth Vader tortures Solo to lure Luke Skywalker to Bespin, then freezes Han in carbonite to test the process before using it on his true prize. On Dagobah, Yoda continues training Luke in the ways of the Force, but the young Jedi has visions of his friends suffering in Cloud City and resolves to rescue them despite Yoda's objections.
title: Star Wars (1977) #43: The Empire Strikes Back: Betrayal at Bespin
